title: Horse Armor Stand updated
description: Introducing: Armor Stand, but now for Horses (Updated 1.21.11 more coming)
body:
What is this mod about this mod was made orginally by [HyeroDrimm] (https://modrinth.com/user/HyeroDrimm) Updated by Me Send me a msg on iusse tracker for any issues or other mods yall want me to udpated need 10 diff people to tell me and i will do it.

Fully updated supports all new horse armor

Well, the name says it all, it adds a Horse Armor Stand and just like with the classic armor stand in vanilla, you can display your favorite horse armor.

It should work with no problem with any mods, that add vanilla-looking (without fancy models) armor to the game.

How to obtain
Well you see it's quite simple, you need to craft it like this:


![Also i added to recpie book so ur good](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4d56a9b043fd2af689b4d185261421b23c7e29e.png)
